feed.title: Engineer's Notes
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Elastic Cache as a Vector Store and processing embeddings. BedRock service.

link.title: Elastic Cache as a Vector Store and processing embeddings. BedRock service.

entry.summary: Abstract Embedding. How it works example of Gemany/Italy Prepare schema in Redis Algorithms to search vectors Congratulations we have just implemented 80% of AWS BedRock functionality Ingesting Data into Vector-based storage Let’s find a CloudBuilders based on a particular topic We have a digital footprint of Cloud Buiders What else can we do with vectors Links:

entry.title: Turning Text into Art: Using AWS Nova to augment Blog post with illustrations

link.title: Turning Text into Art: Using AWS Nova to augment Blog post with illustrations

entry.summary: Abstract When hosting a post content majority of hosting platforms provide the top header image section that acts as a hook to associate blog’s content with some visualization and this is actually the first big thing that audience will see. For content creators there are many libraries with free images like pexel, also there non-free subscription based photos/images catalogues. Often you sp...

entry.title: Amazon Q cli: developing Second Brain chrome extension for converting web-pages into obsidian-like markdown

link.title: Amazon Q cli: developing Second Brain chrome extension for converting web-pages into obsidian-like markdown

entry.summary: Abstract There’s an overwhelming amount of great content on the web, and alongside that, local tools like Notion, Obsidian, and Quartz have become increasingly popular. They’re excellent for indexing information, performing advanced searches, and staying accessible — even offline. What I Built The challenge is, while browsing online, we often come across content we’d love to revisit later....

entry.title: Cloud-Native Threat Detection: Deploying YARA for Scalable Malware Detection in EKS

link.title: Cloud-Native Threat Detection: Deploying YARA for Scalable Malware Detection in EKS

entry.summary: YARA is a powerful tool used for pattern matching in files, primarily for malware detection and digital forensics. It enables users to create rules that define the characteristics of malicious files, making it a crucial component in cybersecurity. In this post, we’ll explore how YARA works, provide practical examples, and demonstrate how to deploy it as a service in a Kubernetes (K8s) cluster. ...

entry.title: Making Extremely Fast AWS Elastic Cache Redis with Lua

link.title: Making Extremely Fast AWS Elastic Cache Redis with Lua

entry.summary: AWS ElastiCache for Redis offers a managed, high-performance, in-memory data store that is widely adopted for caching, session management, real-time analytics, and more. To further enhance performance, Redis includes support for Lua scripting, enabling developers to execute complex operations atomically and reduce the overhead of multiple network calls. This combination of AWS ElastiCache fo...
